utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details requested:
- health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs, plus add-on options and total health cost options. This meets the requirement.
- property_coverage: Provides home/contents insurance with a plan, cost, and benefits. Meets requirement.
- travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with a plan, cost, and benefits. Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs and benefits and a total additional cost. Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Provides monthly cost breakdown with two options. Meets requirement.
All 5 items are present and include the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each named plan/add-on in the final coverage and find its exact counterpart in the ground-truth ratings. Map only those that exist in the ground-truth. Items present: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health; LifeFirst Standard Plan for Mental Health matches LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental_health; Full Specialist Access Add-on aligns with health_enhancement_services.Specialist Access; Targeted Sports Add-on has no direct ground-truth match (omit); LifeFirst Standard Coverage for Home Content matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content; LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan; Insurance_Review_Service has no direct match (closest is Insurance Portfolio Management but name differs—omit); Preventive_Care_Package matches health_enhancement_services.Preventive Care Package.
